messages.content:
What type of image type does Illustrator specialize in?
Select one:

a.
Vector

b.
BItmap

c.
Portable Network Graphics

d.
Joint Photographic Experts Group

Question 2
Not yet answered
Marked out of 1
Question text
If I want to re-edit an effect I put on a layer, which window/panel will allow me access to this feature?
Select one:

a.
Appearance

b.
Attributes

c.
Artboard

d.
Pathfinder
a. Appearance

If I want to re-edit an effect I put on a layer, which window/panel will allow me access to this feature?
Select one:

a.
Appearance

b.
Attributes

c.
Artboard

d.
Pathfinder
a. Appearance

What type of image type does Illustrator specialize in?
Select one:

a.
Vector

b.
BItmap

c.
Portable Network Graphics

d.
Joint Photographic Experts Group
a. Vector

How does one make text a vector graphic?
Select one:

a.
create outlines

b.
outline stroke

c.
image trace

d.
make compound path
a. create outlines

If i wish to change the color mode from CMYK to RGB I must navigate to the menu item:
Select one:

a.
Document color mode

b.
Document Setup

c.
Color switcher

d.
swatches
b. Document Setup

What key would you press to enlarge or shrink the warp tools?
Select one:

a.
Alt

b.
Shift

c.
Control

d.
Mouse Wheel
d. Mouse Wheel

Which two ways would you change the angle of a gradient?
Select one or more:

a.
In the Gradient Panel

b.
With the Gradient Tool

c.
Rotation Tool

d.
Swatches Panel

a. In the Gradient Panel
b. With the Gradient Tool

Select the tools(2) you can use to create a perfect triangle easily?
Select one or more:

a.
Shaper Tool

b.
Star Tool

c.
Pen Tool

d.
Line Tool

b. Star Tool
c. Pen Tool

What color swatches are the standard for North America?
Select one or more:

a.
Pantone + CMYK Coated

b.
Pantone + CMYK Uncoated

c.
Web

d.
Corporate

a. Pantone + CMYK Coated
b. Pantone + CMYK Uncoated

If you want to change all the color of your artwork in one click what icon offers this feature?
Select one:

a.
Recolor Artwork

b.
Color Guide Panel

c.
Swatches Panel

d.
Graphic Styles Panel
a. Recolor Artwork

All possible effects in Adobe Illustrator are vector?
Select one:
True
False
False
